basicInfo.title: Basic Information

optimizationConfig.title: Optimization Config
optimizationConfig.objectiveCriteriaPlaceholder:
Please enter objective evaluation criteria, for example:
1. Accuracy: Whether the information matches the facts
2. Completeness: Whether all necessary information is included
3. Relevance: Whether the reply directly solves the problem
optimizationConfig.subjectiveCriteriaPlaceholder:
Please enter subjective evaluation criteria, for example:
1. Friendliness: Whether the tone is warm and friendly
2. Comprehensibility: Whether the expression is easy to understand
3. Helpfulness: Whether it is helpful to users
optimizationConfig.backgroundKnowledgePlaceholder:
Please enter relevant background knowledge, for example:
- Product Features
- Business Rules
- Professional Terminology
optimizationConfig.objectiveTooltip: Evaluate based on clear standards and facts
optimizationConfig.subjectiveTooltip: Evaluate based on personal feelings and experiences
optimizationConfig.exampleCountTooltip: The number of examples used in each round of optimization. During optimization, several examples will be selected from the use case set according to a certain strategy and concatenated to the end of the prompt as few shot to guide the optimization direction.
optimizationConfig.targetAccuracyTooltip: During optimization, if the target accuracy is reached, the optimization task will end early.
optimizationConfig.maxRoundsTooltip: The maximum number of rounds for the optimization task. If the target accuracy is not reached, the optimization task will end after completing the maximum optimization rounds.
optimizationConfig.llmParallelTooltip: Maximum concurrency when the optimization task uses the test case set for training.
optimizationConfig.optimizeModelTooltip: Model used to optimize prompts, it is recommended to use a model with relatively superior capabilities.
optimizationConfig.runModelTooltip: Model used when the prompt is actually running, it is recommended to use a model consistent with the real scenario.
optimizationConfig.backgroundKnowledgeTooltip: Provide background information and context required for evaluation

parameters.title: Parameter Configuration
parameters.apiKeyHint: API Key for authenticating requests to the Model API Service
parameters.baseUrlHint: Base URL of the Model API Service
parameters.endpointError: Base URL must start with http:// or https://
parameters.temperatureDesc: Controls the randomness and creativity of the model's generated output. A higher value produces more random and diverse results, while a lower value yields more deterministic and conservative outputs. The typical range is 0 to 2, with recommended settings between 0.1 and 1.0. Examples: 0.7 (balanced randomness and coherence), 1.2 (more creative output)
parameters.toppDesc: Top-p Sampling: Select the smallest set of words whose cumulative probability reaches p for sampling. Dynamically adjusts the number of candidate words to balance output diversity and quality. Typically set to 0.9-0.95. When used with temperature sampling, it is recommended to adjust only one of them.
parameters.timeoutDesc: Timeout range: 1-300 seconds (out-of-range values will be automatically adjusted)
